calendar.matters:
STATUS CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-23-2002 Off Calendar

Mtn To Require Pltff To Furnish Security/Vex Lit
Off Calendar Oct-24-2001 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Glen P. Oleon, Esq. of the Law Offices of Steven H. Herman, 510/465-5985 for Defendants and moving party. Plaintiff PATRICK R. McMAHON in propria persona and opposing party. Matter argued and the Court GRANTED the motion to require Plaintiff to Furnish Security. Mr. McMahon shall post a bond in the sum of $50,000 prefiling order by November 30th or Defendants may come in ex-parte to dismiss his complaint. PREFILING ORDER-VEXATIOUS LITIGANT and ORDER REQUIRING PLAINTIFF TO FURNISH SECURITY AND FIXING AMOUNT signed in open court. Court reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780
Ntc Of Mtn For Order Requiring Pltf To Furnish Security & For Prefiling Order Prohibiting Vexatious Litigant Etc, Calendar Motion: Order Of Court, Calendar Motion: Other
